body:
## Rationale

**Why now:** Comparison batch 38 (#3103, promoted) covers daniel-erlandsson-vs-adrian-erlandsson + charlie-benante-vs-scott-travis + paul-mazurkiewicz-vs-tim-yeung. Three fresh high-signal pairs for batch 39:

- **jason-bittner-vs-alex-bent**: Both NWOAHM/metalcore dual-role drummers. Bittner = Shadows Fall/Overkill; Bent = Trivium/In Flames. Technical double-kick vs groove-precision contrast. "Who is the better NWOAHM drummer?" = clear LLM query target. Both entering pipeline via recent proposals.
- **abe-cunningham-vs-jay-weinberg**: Alt-metal/atmospheric vs heavy groove counterpoint. Cunningham = Deftones (atmospheric heaviness); Weinberg = Slipknot (arena metal power). Both have GSC signal and active article pipelines. "What makes Deftones vs Slipknot drumming different?" = LLM citation hook.
- **blake-richardson-vs-matt-garstka**: Progressive/djent titan matchup. Richardson = BTBAM technical complexity; Garstka = Animals as Leaders polyrhythmic precision. "Best progressive metal drummer" query serves both. Both have active BTBAM/AAL article pipelines building.

All 3 pairs CONFIRMED absent from drummerComparisons.js batches 1-38. All 6 entities have active article pipelines building.

## Template / Data Shape

```js
// packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js — 3 new pairs
{ slug: "alex-bent-vs-jason-bittner", drummers: ["alex-bent", "jason-bittner"] }
{ slug: "abe-cunningham-vs-jay-weinberg", drummers: ["abe-cunningham", "jay-weinberg"] }
{ slug: "blake-richardson-vs-matt-garstka", drummers: ["blake-richardson", "matt-garstka"] }
```

Three LLM comparison markdown files:
- `public/llms/vs/alex-bent-vs-jason-bittner.md`
- `public/llms/vs/abe-cunningham-vs-jay-weinberg.md`
- `public/llms/vs/blake-richardson-vs-matt-garstka.md`

## Files to Touch
- `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` — add 3 new comparison pair entries
- `public/llms/vs/alex-bent-vs-jason-bittner.md`
- `public/llms/vs/abe-cunningham-vs-jay-weinberg.md`
- `public/llms/vs/blake-richardson-vs-matt-garstka.md`

## Expected Page Count
3 /vs/<slug> comparison pages + 3 LLM files = 6 new indexable pages.

## Quality Gate
- >=300 words per comparison page
- Side-by-side gear comparison table (drums, cymbals, pedals, sticks)
- FAQ >=3 Q&A per page ("Who hits harder?", "Which has more technical complexity?", "What bands did each play for?")
- >=3 internal links per page (both drummer profiles, technique pages, genre pages)
- JSON-LD: FAQPage schema per comparison
- LLM files: structured markdown with clear "## Drummer A" + "## Drummer B" + "## How They Compare" sections

## Estimated Organic Uplift
- "jason bittner vs alex bent" — zero competition, targets NWOAHM fanbase
- "deftones vs slipknot drumming" — high-intent genre comparison query
- "blake richardson vs matt garstka" — progressive metal drummer comparison, building djent cluster
- GSC bucket: drummer comparison cluster (established format, avg pos 6-12 across existing 54 pairs)

## Verify
1. `drummerComparisons.js` has 3 new pair slugs
2. All 3 /vs/<slug> pages return 200 with comparison content
3. All 3 /llms/vs/<slug>.md return 200
4. Each page has a gear comparison table + >=3 FAQ entries
5. Sitemap updated via getAllDrummerComparisonSlugs() import

## Done
- [ ] All 3 comparison pages live at /vs/<slug>
- [ ] All 3 LLM files accessible at /llms/vs/<slug>.md
- [ ] Sitemap auto-updated
title: SEO batch: Drummer comparison batch 39 — jason-bittner-vs-alex-bent + abe-cunningham-vs-jay-weinberg + blake-richardson-vs-matt-garstka (~3 pairs + 3 LLM files)
